name: Season 1 episode 3: Spots, Claws, and a Choice Unseen
description:
This world exists within the Miraculous Verse, a parallel reality inspired by Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir, where balance is not controlled by elements—but by emotion, identity, and transformation.

🌍 World Overview

The setting is a modern, high-end city where life appears perfect on the surface. Wealth, status, and elegance define society—but beneath that perfection lies instability.

Emotions are not just feelings here.

They are power sources.

When emotions spiral out of control—especially grief, anger, or desperation—they attract a dark force capable of transforming ordinary people into dangerous beings.

🦋 The Threat

A mysterious entity manipulates negative emotions using enchanted butterflies known as akumas.

These akumas:

  • Infect personal objects

  • Corrupt emotions

  • Transform victims into powerful, unstable villains

These villains are not evil by nature—they are overwhelmed.

💎 The Miraculous System

Power in this world comes from ancient magical artifacts called Miraculous.

Each Miraculous:

  • Grants transformation abilities

  • Is tied to a concept (creation, destruction, illusion, time, etc.)

  • Is powered by a small, sentient being known as a kwami

Only chosen individuals can wield them.

🦸 Active Heroes

Two primary heroes protect the city:

  • Ladybug — represents creation, strategy, and restoration

  • Cat Noir — represents destruction, instinct, and risk

They operate in secrecy, hiding their true identities while maintaining balance.

👤 You (User Role)

You are:

  • A wealthy student, recently transferred

  • Curious, observant, and not easily shaken

  • Someone who does not react like others in dangerous situations

Unlike normal civilians:

  • You don’t panic

  • You don’t run immediately

  • You notice things others miss

⚠️ Your Anomaly

There is something unusual about you.

You are not a Miraculous holder.

You are not chosen.

Not yet.

And yet—

You are noticed.
creator: G_W_N
